images.alt: The visual is a dynamic, cinematic wide shot capturing a frantic sprint through a brutalist concrete cityscape at sunset. I am captured mid-run, leaning forward with intense determination, my hair whipping wildly behind me. I am wearing a ripped white tank top and loose track shorts, but the entire scene is washed in a vaporwave gradient filter—swirling streaks of electric blue, hot pink, and vibrant purple neon cutting through the grey concrete buildings. The pride flag colors are integrated as glitchy, pixelated artifacts floating in the air, like digital debris from a corrupted video file. In the background, a massive, low-poly wireframe sun hovers over the horizon, glowing intensely. The motion blur is heavy, emphasizing speed and urgency. The vibe is a high-speed escape into a neon-drenched future.

images.alt:
A cinematic science-fiction series poster styled like a premium streaming drama. Dominating the right half of the image is the massive space battleship Yamato, its weathered black-and-red hull angled toward the viewer as it emerges against the backdrop of space. The ship's bow resembles a naval vessel reborn as a starship, with layered gun emplacements, antennae, and superstructure stretching toward the stern. The name "Yamato" appears in Japanese characters on the hull.
Behind the vessel hangs a wounded Earth, filling much of the upper-right corner. Large sections of the planet glow with fiery orange scars and burning impact zones, suggesting a world on the verge of collapse. The darkness of space surrounds the scene, punctuated by distant stars.
In the foreground stand five members of the crew. Front and center is a young man in a white uniform jacket with red trim and anchor insignia, gazing upward with determination. Beside him stands an older naval commander with a white beard and captain's hat, projecting authority and experience. Additional crew members in blue, yellow, and green uniforms complete the ensemble, each facing the future with varying expressions of concern and resolve.
The left side of the poster contains large metallic block lettering reading “STAR BLAZERS,” with a streaming-style presentation above it and the subtitle “Season One: The Voyage of the Yamato.” Below, the tagline reads: “One year to save a dying Earth.” At the bottom of the image, a devastated city skyline burns beneath smoke-filled clouds, reinforcing the desperate stakes of the mission.

Keywords:
space battleship, starship, Earth, crew ensemble, science fiction, space opera, planetary crisis, military futurism, epic voyage, streaming series, anime adaptation, cosmic adventure

images.alt:
A satirical science fiction illustration depicts a crowd of thin, green-gray extraterrestrials gathered in what resembles an alien protest rally. Their bodies are skeletal and elongated, with oversized heads, enormous glossy black eyes, and narrow mouths frozen in expressions of alarm and determination. Several aliens hold crude protest signs made from weathered white boards with bold black lettering. The largest sign, raised above the crowd, reads “ALIEN LIFE IS LIFE,” while another prominent sign declares “END ERIDICATION NOW.”
The scene is rendered in a graphic comic-book style with heavy black linework and muted green, gray, and pale olive tones. The background is filled with more aliens stretching into the distance, creating the impression of a large demonstration. Dark foliage frames the edges of the image, while a cloudy sky overhead contains silhouettes of flying creatures that resemble birds or alien bats. The signs appear worn and distressed, suggesting an organized movement rather than a spontaneous gathering.
The image humorously inverts common human activist slogans by imagining a distant extraterrestrial civilization debating the fate of Earth. The aliens appear deeply concerned, as though humanity is an endangered species threatened by a larger interstellar industrial project. The overall mood combines social satire, environmental activism imagery, and classic pulp science fiction, creating the impression of a cosmic protest demanding protection for a primitive but intelligent world.
Keywords:
aliens, protest, demonstration, extraterrestrial, science fiction, activism, placards, crowd, satire, comic art, large eyes, dystopian
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A blackened metal relic hangs suspended from a rusted iron chain in the center of the frame, appearing as though it has been pulled directly from the heart of a furnace. The object resembles a small iron box or ancient container, but its surface has been transformed by intense heat. Layers of charred crust crack and peel away like volcanic rock, revealing brilliant veins of molten orange and red glowing from within. A jagged opening near the lower center burns brightest, exposing a fiery core that radiates heat against the otherwise cold, gray surroundings.
The relic is suspended in a ruined industrial or post-apocalyptic setting. Heavy chains stretch through the blurred background, while smoke, drifting ash, and glowing embers float through the air. The shallow depth of field isolates the object, making every blistered texture, fractured surface, and glowing fissure stand out in sharp detail. Melted residue hangs from the bottom edge in hardened drips, suggesting the relic has endured unimaginable temperatures.
The color palette contrasts cold steel grays and soot-black textures with intense orange firelight. Behind the relic, distant flames flicker softly through haze and smoke, hinting at destruction beyond the frame. The overall scene feels ancient and ominous, as if this suspended object is a cursed artifact, a furnace heart, or a forgotten fragment of some infernal machine still burning long after the world around it has fallen silent.
Keywords:
molten relic, glowing embers, rusted chain, infernal artifact, cracked metal, industrial ruin, furnace core, dark fantasy, burning object, smoke haze, post-apocalyptic, volcanic texture

Rocky Road ice cream is a classic American ice cream flavor that typically consists of chocolate ice cream that has been mixed with marshmallows and nuts, usually almonds or walnuts.
The origin of the name is uncertain, but it is thought to refer to the rocky, bumpy texture of the nuts and marshmallows mixed into the ice cream. The flavor was first introduced in the early 20th century, and it quickly became popular among ice cream lovers.
In addition to the core ingredients of chocolate ice cream, marshmallows, and nuts, variations of Rocky Road ice cream may include additional mix-ins, such as fudge, caramel, or chocolate chips. Some versions may also use a different ice cream base, such as vanilla or coffee ice cream, to create a different flavor profile.
Rocky Road ice cream is often enjoyed on its own as a dessert, but it can also be used as a component in other desserts, such as milkshakes, sundaes, or ice cream cakes.
